Description: Uncovered a JSON Web Token, which may lead to unauthorized access to web applications and sensitive user data.
Author: Clay Johnson
Message:
Add dev/prod environment separation, fix scan count updates, and improve database sync

- Add dev/prod Supabase database separation with automatic switching
- Fix scan count not updating after scans (client-side increment)
- Fix missing google_books_id and uri columns in dev database
- Add ScanLimitBanner refresh after scans complete
- Fix book covers not showing on profile (load from Supabase)
- Fix books found count display in recent scans
- Update version to 1.0.6 build 18

Description: Found an OpenAI API Key, posing a risk of unauthorized access to AI services and data manipulation.
Author: Clay Johnson
Message:
Complete app restructure with tab navigation and enhanced book scanning

✨ Major Features Added:
- Bottom tab navigation (Scans, My Library, Explore)
- Dual AI scanning (OpenAI + Gemini integration)
- ChatGPT book validation and correction
- Smart book categorization (Pending vs Incomplete)
- Two-column grid layout with large book covers
- Book approval/rejection workflow with bulk actions
- Google Books API integration for cover fetching
- User authentication system
- Fast image picker (no compression delays)

🔧 Technical Improvements:
- TypeScript integration with proper type definitions
- Async storage for data persistence
- SafeAreaView for proper mobile UI
- Optimized background cover fetching
- Real-time book selection with visual indicators

📱 UI Enhancements:
- Modern card-based design with shadows
- Instant modal animations
- Clean pending/rejected book sections
- Progress tracking for scan operations
- Responsive 2-column book grid layout

🚀 Performance Optimizations:
- Removed slow processing queue UI
- Eliminated image compression delays
- Background cover fetching
- Efficient state management
